The Girl Next Door (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,589,444Details
International Box Office $17,045,706
Worldwide Box Office $31,635,150
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,003,806 (41.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,148 opening theaters/2,148 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,098,190

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 9th, 2004 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: August 26th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 24th, 2004 by Fox Home Entertainment
August 9th, 2004 by 20th Century Fox
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, language and some drug/alcohol use.
Running Time: 108 minutes
Geographical setting: Los Angeles
Plot point: Lacrosse, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance
Social setting: High School, Porn Business
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Regency Enterprises, Fox 2000 Pictures, New Regency
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
